product_name: Havells Stealth Air Premium Ceiling Fan
raw_text: The fan looks great and the premium look fits my living room perfectly. However, the motor makes a low humming noise when run at full speed. Sturdy build overall.

product_name: Havells Stealth Air Premium Ceiling Fan
raw_text: Very noisy motor. It makes a loud clicking sound. The look is premium but what is the point if I cannot sleep because of the noise? Disappointed.

product_name: Havells Stealth Air Premium Ceiling Fan
raw_text: Havells did a great job. Absolutely silent fan. Easy to install, took only 15 minutes. High speed delivery by Flipkart.

product_name: Havells Stealth Air Premium Ceiling Fan
raw_text: design to badhiya hai par speed thodi kam lagti hai. Motor noise is quiet but blades could be wider. Packing was slightly torn.
Water gets hot really fast, less than 5 minutes. The digital display looks very futuristic. Installation was free and neat.
Worst experience. Within 2 weeks, heating stopped working. Heating element defective. Customer service was unhelpful and kept delaying the repair. Do not buy!
Good heater, gets water hot quickly. However, delivery was late by 3 days and the outer box was completely crushed. Inside unit was safe though.
Excellent air purifier. Filtered all the dust and pet dander from the room. Very silent sleep mode. Sleek design.
The air purifier operates well but the body is cheap plastic. On high speed, it has a strange plastic smell which defeats the purpose of purifying air. Customer service is unreachable.
Clean design and very silent sleep mode. But the replacement filter is extremely expensive and installation instructions were hard to follow.
